name: Strawberry Bavarian Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin and sugar in boiling water.
2. Add cold water. Chill until thickened.
3. Arrange strawberries in bottom of pie shell.
4. With electric mixer at medium speed, beat the thickened gelatin until fluffy and about doubled in volume.
5. Blend in 1 cup of the whipped topping. Chill until mixture mounds.
6. Spoon over berries in pie shell. Chill about 4 hours.
7. Garnish with remaining whipped topping and additional berries, if desired.
